option.name: originalContent
option.value:
[package] name = "pdf_signing" description = "Crate for adding signatures and digitaly sign pdf documents." version = "0.1.0" authors = ["Ralph Bisschops <ralph.bisschops.dev@gmail.com>"] edition = "2021" license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0" readme = "README.md" keywords = ["pdf", "signing"] categories = ["encoding", "graphics"] repository = "https://github.com/ralpha/pdf_signing"
# See more keys and their definitions at https://doc.rust-lang.org/cargo/reference/manifest.html
[dependencies] log = "0.4.29" lopdf = { version = "0.39.0", features = [ "chrono", ], default-features = false} png = "0.18.1" rand = "0.9.1" sha2 = "0.10.8" sha1 = "0.10.6" base64 = "0.22.1" chrono = { version = "0.4.44", features = ["serde"] } serde = { version = "1.0.228", features = ["derive"] } serde_json = { version = "1.0.149", features = ["preserve_order"] } cryptographic-message-syntax = "0.28.0" x509-certificate = "0.25.0" bcder = "0.7.6" reqwest = { version = "0.12.15", features = ["blocking"] } x509-parser = "0.18.1" rasn-ocsp = "0.28.8" rasn-pkix = "0.28.8" rasn = "0.28.8"
[features] default = []
debug = []

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
[package] name = "pdf_signing" description = "Crate for adding signatures and digitaly sign pdf documents." version = "0.1.0" authors = ["Ralph Bisschops <ralph.bisschops.dev@gmail.com>"] edition = "2021" license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0" readme = "README.md" keywords = ["pdf", "signing"] categories = ["encoding", "graphics"] repository = "https://github.com/ralpha/pdf_signing"
# See more keys and their definitions at https://doc.rust-lang.org/cargo/reference/manifest.html
[dependencies] log = "0.4.29" lopdf = { version = "0.39.0", features = [ "chrono", ], default-features = false} png = "0.18.1" rand = "0.9.1" sha2 = "0.10.8" sha1 = "0.10.6" base64 = "0.22.1" chrono = { version = "0.4.44", features = ["serde"] } serde = { version = "1.0.228", features = ["derive"] } serde_json = { version = "1.0.149", features = ["preserve_order"] } cryptographic-message-syntax = "0.28.0" x509-certificate = "0.25.0" bcder = "0.7.6" reqwest = { version = "0.12.15", features = ["blocking"] } x509-parser = "0.18.1" rasn-ocsp = "0.28.8" rasn-pkix = "0.28.8" rasn = "0.28.8"
[features] default = []
debug = []

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
